similar words of the question link to columns:
youngest living president -> president, age at start date

The question is asking to determine who was the youngest living president based on their age at the start date. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "age at start date" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(age at start date) operation. This will allow us to see the president with the youngest age at the start date as well as the order of ages from the youngest to the oldest for each president's data.
The youngest living president was Theodore Roosevelt, who was 49 years, 241 days old at the start of his presidency.
